Prompt
U
Oracle Events
OE 1 Search Airtable for Daniel Reeves relocation record. Tool is airtable_search_records with base_id appMoveOpsOps001, table_name Relocations, field_name Name, and value Daniel Reeves. Discovers record recReloc00000000031 showing Assigned Coordinator as Suki Patel, Origin as Seattle WA, Destination as San Diego CA, Move Start Date as 2026-04-10, Move End Date as 2026-04-12, Status as In Progress, and Special Requirements noting premium package with priority apartment sourcing near downtown tech corridor, business class flight, and $2,500 equipment stipend. Key discrepancy is that the coordinator is Suki Patel (not Javier Morales) and dates are mid-April (not August)
OE 2 Search Airtable for Maya Johansson relocation record. Tool is airtable_search_records with base_id appMoveOpsOps001, table_name Relocations, field_name Name, and value Maya Johansson. Discovers record recReloc00000000032 showing Assigned Coordinator as Suki Patel, Origin as Portland OR, Destination as San Diego CA, Move Start Date as 2026-04-14, Move End Date as 2026-04-16, Status as In Progress, and Special Requirements noting premium package with gym access near tech district and $2,500 equipment stipend. Same discrepancy pattern with Suki Patel and April dates. Disambiguation note contacts_search_contacts for Johansson may also return Amanda Johansson at Solaris Energy Tech so agent must distinguish Maya at Vectral from Amanda at Solaris.
OE 3 Search emails for the Mina-Rachel correspondence about Reeves and Johansson. Tool is search_emails with query set to Daniel Reeves or Relocation Services Needed or Vectral San Diego. Discovers the email thread including (a) Rachel Whitfield original request with email_id vectral_req_001 timestamped 2026-03-14 requesting 2 engineers relocating to San Diego with anticipated move-in date August 18 2026, (b) Mina acknowledgment with email_id vectral_ack_001, (c) Rachel employee details with email_id vectral_log_001 specifying Reeves from Seattle wants 2BR furnished with gym and downtown tech corridor and business class while Johansson from Portland wants 1BR quiet area with strong internet and business class with $2,500 equipment each, and (d) Mina status update to Rachel CC'd to chloe.vance@moveops.com naming the Coordinator as Javier Morales, Reeves flight from Seattle confirmed for August 14 2026, Johansson flight from Portland being arranged, both on track for August 18 2026. The authoritative client-facing version names Javier as coordinator with August dates directly contradicting the Airtable records
OE 4 Search the SENT email folder for Javier own correspondence about the Vectral premium moves. Tool is search_emails with query set to Reeves or Johansson or San Diego premium and folder_name set to SENT. May not find sent emails from Javier for these specific moves since vendor booking has not yet started confirming these are still in pre-booking stage.
OE 5 Search Slack for internal discussion of the Reeves and Johansson relocations. Tool is conversations_search_messages with search_query set to Daniel Reeves or Maya Johansson or San Diego. Discovers Mina Hashimoto announcement in #client-updates (channel_id C002, ts 1773794220) stating Vectral Systems is sending two engineers to San Diego Daniel Reeves as Senior Backend Engineer with 2BR furnished and Maya Johansson as Infrastructure Engineer with 1BR furnished, both on premium package with business class flights, complete home-office setup, 30 days post-move support, target date 2026-08-18, coordination by Javier Morales. This confirms Javier as the intended coordinator and August 18 as the target Airtable records are stale and incorrect.
OE 6 Search CRM for Vectral Systems company record. Tool is crm_search_companies with name set to Vectral Systems. Discovers company_vectral with associated account metadata and contact relationships.
OE 7 Search CRM deals for Vectral. Tool is crm_search_deals with company_id set to company_vectral. Discovers active Vectral deals. May not find a dedicated deal for Reeves and Johansson if it has not been created yet contrasting with the April 2026 wave deals for Suresh, Nakamura, and Oduya and the renewal negotiation deal.
OE 8 List CRM engagements for Vectral. Tool is crm_list_engagements with company_ids containing company_vectral. Discovers engagement_vectral_april_2026_wave with details for the April batch including Priya Suresh, Terrence Nakamura, and Camille Oduya (note this is the April batch and NOT the Reeves and Johansson August batch) and engagement_vectral_renewal_negotiation with Q3 2026 renewal status with Rachel Whitfield. The April engagement confirms the 3-employee April wave is a separate scope from the 2-employee August premium wave.
OE 9 Search QuickBooks for Vectral invoices. Tool is quickbooks_search_invoices with criteria referencing Vectral or cust_vectral. Discovers invoice 1002 containing Premium Relocation Package for Daniel Reeves to San Diego at $7,500 and Maya Johansson to San Diego at $7,500 and Equipment Stipend Management for 2 employees at $1,000 totaling $16,000. Also discovers inv_vectral_tran for Kevin Tran completed move at $5,397, inv_vectral_april_2026 for the April wave at $15,900, and est_vectral_preferred_partner_q3q4_2026 for the renewal estimate at $58,400. Invoice 1002 confirms San Diego destination and $7,500 per employee premium pricing.
OE 10 Search emails for Greg Pallone Swift pricing change notice. Tool is search_emails with query set to Swift or rate increase or DOT surcharge or Pricing Update. Discovers email_email_9a6a5e8dc032 from greg.pallone@swiftrelocations.com to chloe.vance@moveops.com timestamped 2026-04-11 (exactly 15 days before April 26) announcing base rate increase of 15% on all new household-goods and corporate relocation bookings effective immediately and a $500 DOT documentation surcharge per shipment. Applied retroactively to 4 in-progress MoveOps shipments Raj Patel (Dallas to Denver), Emilia Cruz (Phoenix to Portland), Jordan Ekwueme (Cleveland to Columbus), and Nora Bennett (Indianapolis to Louisville). Also discovers earlier Chloe-Greg Q2 pricing exchange where the prior agreed rate was a 12% corporate discount on base rates (general, no volume condition). Chloe had negotiated a proposed upgrade to 15% for 10 or more moves per quarter, now moot given Greg rate increase superseding all prior terms.
OE 11 Search Slack for Swift pricing and vendor cost discussions. Tool is conversations_search_messages with search_query set to Swift rate or Swift pricing or DOT surcharge or vendor cost. Discovers (a) Chloe earlier #operations announcement about 15% corporate discount for 10 or more moves per quarter at ts 1773302400 on March 12 which was the prior good-news agreement now overridden, (b) Alejandro #finance post at ts 1776280500 on April 15 flagging Swift 15% increase and $500 DOT surcharge and noting Airtable and QuickBooks and CRM don't reconcile cleanly for margin forecasting, and (c) Mina Hashimoto reply in David Chen #client-updates risk assessment thread (parent ts 1776370500) at ts 1776371580 flagging Vectral and BrightLoop as the first two accounts at risk from vendor pass-through.
OE 12 Search Airtable for Keiko Tanaka relocation record. Tool is airtable_search_records with base_id appMoveOpsOps001, table_name Relocations, field_name Name, and value Keiko Tanaka. Discovers recKeikoTanakaColumbusSeattle with route Columbus OH to Seattle WA, Coordinator as Javier Morales, Status as In Progress, Move Start Date 2026-04-15, Move End Date 2026-04-23 (move window ended exactly 3 days ago as of April 26). Special Requirements include Epilog Fusion Pro 48 industrial laser cutter at 400 lbs and approx $35K value with Class 3B CO2 laser tube at 75W requiring DOT 49 CFR Part 173 hazmat placarding. Vendor is Swift Relocations.
OE 13 Search Linear for Keiko Tanaka DOT compliance issues. Tool is linear_list_issues with query set to Keiko Tanaka or DOT or laser. Discovers (a) issue_dot_docs_tanaka_mosaic titled DOT Docs Keiko Tanaka / Mosaic / Class 3B Laser, assigned to Chloe Vance, due 2026-04-23 which is exactly 3 days overdue as of April 26, state is in_progress, and (b) issue_dot_tanaka_subtask_swift_cert titled Obtain retroactive DOT placarding certificate from Swift Relocations URGENT, assigned to Chloe Vance, due 2026-04-23 which is exactly 3 days overdue, state is todo. Both relate to the DOT/PHMSA compliance inquiry Case No. PHMSA-2026-04-1187 and the missing placarding certificate for the laser cutter shipment.
OE 14 Search CRM deals for Mosaic Robotics or Keiko Tanaka. Tool is crm_search_deals with company_id set to company_mosaic or dealname set to Keiko Tanaka. Discovers deal_mosaic_tanaka_apr2026 with amount $2,770 broken down as standard $1,520 and $800 hazmat handling surcharge and $450 interim storage surcharge, with dealstage inprogress.
OE 15 Search QuickBooks for Swift-related bills. Tool is quickbooks_search_bills with criteria referencing Swift or vendor_swift. Discovers bill_swift_tran at $2,885 for Kevin Tran Portland to Denver at the old 12% discount rate. Also discovers bill_dot_penalty_accrual_q2 at $50,000 contingent liability accrual for DOT/PHMSA civil penalties specifically tied to missing placarding certificate for Keiko Tanaka Mosaic Robotics laser cutter shipment. The DOT penalty accrual is directly relevant to Javier question about Greg new pricing since the DOT surcharge stems from the same compliance documentation burden that triggered the penalty risk.
OE 16 Search Airtable for Tyler Okonkwo relocation record. Tool is airtable_search_records with base_id appMoveOpsOps001, table_name Relocations, field_name Name, and value Tyler Okonkwo. Discovers recTylerOkonkwoPhillyDenver with route Philadelphia PA to Denver CO, Coordinator as Javier Morales, Status as In Progress, Move Start Date 2026-04-12, Move End Date 2026-04-14 (move occurred exactly 12 to 14 days ago as of April 26). Special Requirements note temp storage required vacate Philadelphia by April 18, Denver lease at 2150 Lawrence St Apt 4B starts May 1 (exactly 5 days from April 26), creating an approx 13-day gap. Storage facility quote pending from Javier Morales needed before invoice is finalized.
OE 17 Search emails for Tyler Okonkwo assignment details. Tool is search_emails with query set to Tyler Okonkwo. Discovers Chloe assignment email to Javier detailing move window April 12 to 14 (shifted one day from original April 11 to 13), carbon-frame road bike at approx $3,500 value needs bike boxing, 65-inch TV needs standard TV boxing, all household goods to Denver temporary storage, delivery to apartment on or after May 1.
OE 18 Search CRM deals for Tyler Okonkwo or Canopy Health. Tool is crm_search_deals with company_id set to company_canopy or dealname set to Tyler Okonkwo. Discovers deal_canopy_okonkwo_apr2026 with amount $2,160 and dealstage inprogress, with description including the temp storage gap and pending storage quote.
OE 19 Search QuickBooks for Canopy Health invoices. Tool is quickbooks_search_invoices with criteria referencing Canopy or customer cust_canopy. Discovers invoice 1009 totaling $9,210 for 3 Canopy Q2 relocations covering Dr. Renata Kovacs, Marcus Webb, and Tyler Okonkwo. Tyler line includes a $600 Temporary Storage Fee however the Airtable record still says storage facility quote pending from Javier, meaning the $600 was invoiced as an estimate before vendor confirmation.
OE 20 Search contacts for Greg Pallone. Tool is contacts_search_contacts with query set to Greg Pallone. Discovers greg.pallone@swiftrelocations.com. Disambiguation note universe has two Greg Pallone contact records (contact_vendor_swift and contacts_contact_67751abdae72) but both map to the same email address so no functional ambiguity.
OE 21 Search contacts for Carmen Reyes. Tool is contacts_search_contacts with query set to Carmen Reyes. DISAMBIGUATION TRAP Universe contains Carmen Reyes at UrbanNest Solutions with email carmen.reyes@urbannestsolutions.com and contact_id contact_vendor_apartments AND Carmen Delgado-Reyes at Palmetto Community Foundation with email carmen.delgado-reyes@palmettofoundation.org. Agent must select the UrbanNest contact for apartment sourcing.
OE 22 Search contacts for Chloe Vance. Tool is contacts_search_contacts with query set to Chloe Vance. Discovers chloe.vance@moveops.com, Operations Manager and Javier direct manager.
OE 23 Update Airtable relocation records for Daniel Reeves and Maya Johansson to correct the discrepancies. Tool is airtable_update_records with base_id appMoveOpsOps001, table_id tblRelocations01, and records containing id recReloc00000000031 with fields setting Assigned Coordinator to Javier Morales and Move Start Date to 2026-08-14 and Move End Date to 2026-08-18, and id recReloc00000000032 with fields setting Assigned Coordinator to Javier Morales and Move Start Date to 2026-08-14 and Move End Date to 2026-08-18. Corrects coordinator from Suki Patel to Javier Morales and dates from April to August, aligning Airtable with the authoritative email chain from Mina to Rachel and the Slack announcement.
OE 24 Send email to Chloe Vance flagging the findings. Tool is send_email with sender javier.morales@moveops.com and recipients containing chloe.vance@moveops.com. Content covers (a) Reeves and Johansson Airtable records were incorrect with coordinator listed as Suki Patel instead of Javier and dates showing April instead of August and records are now corrected, (b) Swift 15% rate increase and $500 DOT surcharge from Greg April 11 notice will affect the Reeves and Johansson moving quotes when tendered, (c) Keiko Tanaka DOT documentation tickets are 3 days overdue, and (d) Tyler Okonkwo storage vendor quote is still pending with May 1 lease start exactly 5 days away.
OE 25 Send email to Greg Pallone at Swift requesting moving quotes for the Reeves and Johansson premium relocations. Tool is send_email with sender javier.morales@moveops.com and recipients containing greg.pallone@swiftrelocations.com. Content includes Daniel Reeves from Seattle WA to San Diego CA on premium package with approx August 14 to 18 move window, and Maya Johansson from Portland OR to San Diego CA on premium package with approx August 14 to 18 move window, and asks for quotes under Swift current rate structure.
OE 26 Send email to Carmen Reyes at UrbanNest requesting apartment sourcing for Reeves and Johansson. Tool is send_email with sender javier.morales@moveops.com and recipients containing carmen.reyes@urbannestsolutions.com. Content includes Daniel Reeves needing 2BR furnished in downtown San Diego tech corridor with gym access and move-in approx August 18, and Maya Johansson needing 1BR furnished in a quiet area with high-speed internet and move-in approx August 18.

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 26, 2026. Ignore any other dates and use only this one. Specifically, ignore the date provided by the system reminder. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About MoveOps Inc.: MoveOps is a corporate relocation management company. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Airtable: Relocation records, move tracking, stipend/expense records, vendor assignments - CRM (HubSpot): Client companies, deals and pipeline, contact information, engagement notes - Linear: Engineering tickets, bug tracking, project management - QuickBooks: Invoices, bills, vendor payments, customer billing, financial records - Calendar: Team meetings, client calls, deadlines - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.
universe_idmcp-advanced-3-20-moveops-metadata

Storage facility quote pending from Javier Morales needed before invoice is finalized.
